name: text
title: Text Utility Functions
description: Text processing utilities for cleaning and normalising plain-text extracted by Apache Tika and similar tools.

functions.name: cleanText
functions.description: Removes Apache Tika extraction artifacts from plain text: strips [image: ...] alt-text tokens, decodes HTML entities, removes control characters, trims whitespace per line, joins short orphaned fragments (table cells), and collapses runs of 3+ blank lines. Safe to call on empty strings (returns "").
